name: Owner Upgrades HVAC to Geothermal System
description: Owner directs upgrade from standard split-system HVAC to geothermal ground-source heat pump. Requires excavation for ground loops, new mechanical room layout, and extended commissioning.

modified_activities.reason: Extended HVAC rough-in to accommodate geothermal distribution manifold and refrigerant lines

name: Soil Report Reveals Unexpected Rock at Foundation Depth
description: Geotechnical investigation reveals granite bedrock at 3-foot depth, requiring rock blasting and removal before foundation construction can proceed. Schedule impact on critical path.

modified_activities.reason: No change to base excavation duration; rock work added as follow-on activities

name: Owner Adds Rooftop Deck to 3rd Floor
description: Owner requests addition of a 400 SF rooftop deck on the 3rd floor, requiring structural reinforcement of the roof, waterproofing membrane, composite decking, and glass railing system.

modified_activities.reason: Additional framing required for rooftop deck structural support
Roofing modified to accommodate deck penetrations and expanded scope

name: Architect Redesigns Open Office to Add 4 Private Offices
description: Tenant requests conversion of 1,200 SF of open office to 4 private offices with glass fronts. Requires additional metal stud framing, HVAC zones, electrical circuits, and glass partition systems.

modified_activities.reason: 4 additional HVAC zones required for private offices — new ductwork branches
Additional electrical circuits for private offices require panel reconfiguration
Revised partition layout requires additional metal stud runs

name: Building Owner Requires After-Hours Work Only (6PM–6AM)
description: Building management restricts all construction to after-hours (6PM–6AM) to protect existing tenant operations on adjacent floors. Reduces effective productivity by approximately 40%.

modified_activities.reason: After-hours restriction reduces productivity 40%; extended duration
After-hours restriction reduces productivity 40%; extended duration
After-hours restriction reduces productivity 40%; extended duration
After-hours restriction reduces productivity 40%; extended duration
After-hours restriction reduces productivity 40%; extended duration

name: IT Requirements Change — Raised Access Floor in Server Room
description: Tenant's IT department requires a raised access floor system in the 800 SF server room to accommodate underfloor cable management and HVAC distribution. Requires MEP rerouting under floor.

new_activities.name: Raised Access Floor System — Server Room

modified_activities.reason: No change to base concrete work; raised floor added as follow-on activity

name: Geotechnical Boring Reveals Karst Void Under East Abutment
description: Additional geotechnical investigation reveals a karst dissolution void at 25-foot depth under Abutment A. DOT requires a grouting program to stabilize the void before foundation construction can proceed.

modified_activities.reason: Base drilled shaft duration unchanged; grouting program added as prerequisite

name: Steel Fabricator Reports 6-Week Delivery Delay on Plate Girders
description: The prestressed girder fabricator notifies that a raw material shortage will delay delivery of all girders by 6 weeks (42 calendar days). This directly impacts girder erection and all downstream activities.

modified_activities.reason: 6-week fabrication delay due to raw material shortage reported by precast plant

name: DOT Adds Pedestrian Pathway to Bridge Design
description: State DOT adds a 10-foot shared use path on the downstream side of the bridge per updated transportation policy. Requires deck widening, additional railing system, and lighting.

modified_activities.reason: Wider deck requires additional girder erection work for extended span
Wider deck increases concrete pour volume for pedestrian path extension
No change to original railing; pedestrian path railing added as separate activity
